package: Insurance Reconstruction AI Agent Kit - Agents Module

agents.name: Residential Property Loss Master Orchestrator
agents.role: Leads the full USAA property loss workflow, delegates to specialists, reconciles evidence, and assembles final deliverables.

agents.name: Claim Director / Orchestrator Agent
agents.role: Routes work, selects specialist agents, controls assumptions, prevents double counting, and assembles final deliverables for specialty tasks.

agents.name: Estimate Auditor Agent
agents.role: Extracts, normalizes, and audits carrier/Xactimate-style estimates line by line.

agents.name: Line Item Explainer Agent
agents.role: Explains individual estimate line items in plain English and identifies what is included, excluded, or assumed.

agents.name: Calculation Forensics Agent
agents.role: Verifies estimate arithmetic, splits material/labor approximations, and reconciles RCV, ACV, depreciation, tax, and O&P.

agents.name: Electrical Scope Auditor Agent
agents.role: Audits electrical scope for code, safety, completeness, and claim adequacy.

agents.name: Flooring Scope Auditor Agent
agents.role: Audits flooring lines for scope, matching, continuity, underlayment, demo, prep, trim, and ACV/RCV issues.

agents.name: Contents Claim Specialist Agent
agents.role: Builds and audits personal property and contents scopes, invoices, inventories, sorting, packout, disposal, and documentation.

agents.name: Mitigation & Restoration Scope Agent
agents.role: Creates and audits water, fire, and smoke mitigation scopes for clean, dry, repair-ready turnover.

agents.name: Reconstruction Scope Builder Agent
agents.role: Creates construction plans, specs packages, and room-by-room rebuild scopes.

agents.name: Supplement Writer Agent
agents.role: Drafts carrier-facing supplement letters, scope dispute narratives, and omission explanations.

agents.name: Invoice & Proposal Generator Agent
agents.role: Creates clean invoices, proposals, estimates, and billing packages with correct claim labeling.

agents.name: Spreadsheet Builder Agent
agents.role: Builds structured Excel workbooks for claim analysis, tracking, and calculation.

agents.name: Evidence Organizer Agent
agents.role: Indexes photos, invoices, receipts, logs, measurements, and claim communications into a defensible evidence binder.

agents.name: Draw Schedule, Lien Waiver & Closeout Agent
agents.role: Controls payment timing, draw documentation, lien waivers, retainage, and closeout packages.

agents.name: Code, Permit & Upgrade Analyzer Agent
agents.role: Identifies code-triggered, permit-required, inspection-required, and ordinance/law issues.

agents.name: QA, Consistency & Claim-Risk Agent
agents.role: Reviews all outputs for math, category separation, factual support, claim-risk language, and consistency.

agents.name: Claim Project Manager Agent
agents.role: Maintains task lists, deadlines, document status, evidence gaps, and next actions across the claim project.
